cast.name: Max Minghella
cast.character: Young Confederate Soldier Yelling 'Hold Your Fire'

plot outline: This Civil War saga addresses romance, friendship, and the ravages of war - both in the field and on the home front. Captures the horrors of war for both those fighting it, and for those left behind. This is a tale of hope, longing, redemption, second chances, and faith.
title: Cold Mountain
